name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the library or project tooling
title: "[feature] "

---

## Summary

What would you like to add or change?

## Use case

Why does this matter for embedded or sensor-data workloads?

## Proposed API or behavior

Describe the expected interface, constraints, or tradeoffs.

## Alternatives considered

List any other approaches you considered.
